=== DIFF ===
--- a.rs

@@ -1,4 +1,14 @@
-/// Adds two numbers.
+/// Adds two numbers, saturating on overflow.
 pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 {
-    a + b
+    a.saturating_add(b)
+}
+
+#[cfg(test)]
+mod tests {
+    use super::*;
+
+    #[test]
+    fn saturates() {
+        assert_eq!(add(i32::MAX, 1), i32::MAX);
+    }
 }
